creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
After inspection, I found no change to the pkg-plist. So I accept this patc=
h.
However, the problem about panel disappearing mentioned in the
pkg-message still exists when using python 2.6, and I would
investigate it.

On Sat, Sep 12, 2009 at 11:50 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote=
:

> and a committer will take care of it.
